name: set_home_overlay
description: Applies a temporary heating override to all zones in a home simultaneously. Allows users to manually set heating power status (e.g., boost heating, turn off all zones) across the entire installation. The override can be configured to terminate automatically at the next scheduled time block or after a specified duration. Used for whole-home comfort adjustments without disrupting individual zone schedules.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/installation for which to apply the overlay

overlays.description: Array of overlay configurations, one per zone/room to be controlled

overlay.description: The overlay configuration for this room

isBoost.description: Whether this is a boost heating setting (optional)

power.description: Whether heating should be ON or OFF

temperature.description: Target temperature setting (optional, used when power is ON)

termination.description: Configuration for when/how the overlay should terminate

durationInSeconds.description: Duration in seconds for the override (used with TIMER termination)

typeSkillBasedApp.description: The termination type - TIMER for duration-based, MANUAL for manual resumption

room.description: The zone/room ID to which this overlay setting applies
